footer.description: Specialized cybersecurity consulting focused on measurable results and executive governance.

home.heroTitle: ProHack — Cybersecurity with precision and results
home.heroSubtitle: Pentest, SOC, Incident Response, vCISO and Vulnerability Management, with <highlight>metrics the board understands</highlight>.
home.servicesSubtitle: Complete cybersecurity solutions focused on executive governance and business metrics.
home.faqSubtitle: Clear your doubts about our services
home.ctaSubtitle: Get a free initial assessment and discover how we can strengthen your digital defenses.
home.servicePentestDesc: Complete penetration tests with executive and technical reports
home.serviceSocDesc: Continuous security monitoring with immediate response
home.serviceIrDesc: Fast and coordinated response to security incidents
home.serviceVcisoDesc: Virtual CISO for strategic security governance
home.faq1q: What is the response time for critical incidents?
home.faq1a: Our SLA for critical incidents is response within 1 hour, with initial containment within 4 hours. For emergencies, we have the Panic Button with immediate response via WhatsApp.
home.faq2q: How does the pentest process work?
home.faq2a: We follow a methodology based on the Cyber Kill Chain: reconnaissance, scanning, exploitation, post-exploitation and reporting. We deliver an executive report for the board and a technical one for the teams, with retest included.
home.faq3q: What size companies do you work with?
home.faq3a: We serve from startups to large corporations. Our services are scalable and adapted to the size and maturity of each organization.
home.faq4q: What is the difference between SOC and traditional monitoring?
home.faq4a: Our SOC goes beyond monitoring: it includes active threat hunting, behavioral analysis, automated response via SOAR and executive reports with business metrics.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete cybersecurity solutions with proven methodology and focus on measurable results. Each service is designed to deliver <highlight>metrics the board understands</highlight>.
services.customSubtitle: We combine our services to create a tailored solution for your specific security needs.

methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Structured methodology based on the <highlight>Cyber Kill Chain</highlight> and international frameworks (NIST, ISO 27001, MITRE ATT&CK) to ensure consistent and measurable results.
methodology.killChainSubtitle: Our systematic approach to penetration testing follows the 6 phases of the Cyber Kill Chain
methodology.serviceMethodSubtitle: Specific frameworks adapted for each type of service
methodology.frameworksSubtitle: Our methodology is aligned with the main frameworks and regulations
methodology.ctaTitle: Want to See Our Methodology in Action?
methodology.ctaSubtitle: Request a practical demonstration or discuss how we adapt our methodology to your specific needs.

cases.title: Success Cases
cases.subtitle: Real results in organizations of different sizes and sectors. Each case demonstrates our ability to deliver <highlight>measurable metrics and business impact</highlight>.
cases.ctaSubtitle: Each organization has unique needs. Let's discuss how to adapt our proven experience to solve your specific cybersecurity challenges.

about.title: About ProHack
about.subtitle: We are a specialized cybersecurity consulting firm that combines <highlight>technical precision with executive clarity</highlight>, delivering measurable results that strengthen both security posture and board credibility.
about.missionText: Elevate the cybersecurity maturity of organizations through specialized consulting that translates technical complexity into business value, enabling leaders to make informed decisions about security investments.
about.visionText: To be recognized as the cybersecurity consultancy that best connects technical excellence with business results, being the first choice of CTOs and CISOs seeking long-term strategic partnership.
about.valuesSubtitle: Principles that guide every project and relationship
about.value1Desc: Structured methodology based on international frameworks for consistent and auditable results.
about.value2Desc: We translate technical risks into business impacts with metrics the board understands and accepts.
about.value3Desc: Aggressive SLAs and optimized processes to minimize exposure windows and recovery time.
about.value4Desc: We build lasting relationships focused on sustainable organizational security growth.
about.teamSubtitle: Senior specialists with experience in companies of different sizes and sectors
about.diffSubtitle: What makes us unique in the cybersecurity consulting market
about.diff1Desc: All our deliverables include KPIs and KRIs that demonstrate clear ROI and facilitate board presentations.
about.diff2Desc: Aggressive SLAs with response < 1h for emergencies and MTTR < 24h for critical vulnerabilities.
about.diff3Desc: Every project includes a 90-180 day roadmap with quick wins, tactical initiatives and strategic vision.
about.diff4Desc: We empower your internal teams through structured mentoring and detailed technical documentation.
about.certsSubtitle: We maintain the highest technical certifications and strategic partnerships
about.ctaSubtitle: We are always looking for organizations that value technical excellence and want to elevate their cybersecurity maturity with long-term strategic partnership.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Ready to elevate your organization's security? Our team of specialists is available for a strategic conversation.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill in the details below and our team will contact you within 24 hours.

contact.successDesc: We will contact you within 24 hours. For urgencies, use our WhatsApp.
contact.errorDesc: Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.
contact.consentRequiredDesc: Please accept our privacy policy to continue.
contact.emergencyDesc: For security incidents, use the Panic Button - immediate response
contact.locationDesc: We serve nationwide remotely. On-site available for projects in Greater São Paulo.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy & LGPD
privacy.subtitle: Full transparency about how we process your personal data, in compliance with the <highlight>General Data Protection Law (LGPD)</highlight>.
